fix_instructions.Analytics: Check API connection and credentials in Analytics agent settings → ensure API key is valid and properly configured

fix_instructions.Instagram: Instagram agent is missing INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add it
fix_instructions.Competitor Spy: Competitor Spy agent is missing COMPETITOR_API_KEY in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add it
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer: SEO Optimizer agent is missing SEO_API_KEY in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add it
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer: Video Reviewer agent is missing VIDEO_REVIEWER_API_KEY in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add it
